name: Carmilla
descs: At the start of a non-Focused Encounter, all enemies take fixed damage equal to 20% of their Max HP.
At the start of a non-Focused Encounter, all enemies <style="upgradeHighlight">take fixed damage equal to 25% of their Max HP</style>.
At the start of a non-Focused Encounter, all enemies <style="upgradeHighlight">take fixed damage equal to 30% of their Max HP</style>.
